project_type: Full-stack AI productivity app (Python FastAPI backend + Next.js React frontend)
test_framework: pytest with async tests and conftest.py fixtures (backend), jest (frontend)
verification_instructions: 1. python3.11 -c 'import app.main' (backend import check) 2. python3.11 -m pytest tests/ -v (119 existing tests pass) 3. pnpm build (frontend builds)
setup_instructions: Backend: cd backend && python3.11 -c 'import app.main'. Frontend: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22 via nvm, Python 3.11 via pyenv, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: All agents use AgentBase pattern. Tests mock vertexai and MCP. Orchestrator SYSTEM_PROMPT updated for new routes.
key_patterns: Agents: inherit AgentBase, set name/description/capabilities, implement execute(task:dict)->dict, use self.generate() for Gemini, self.call_mcp_tool() for MCP. Registered in main.py lifespan. Orchestrator routes via SYSTEM_PROMPT JSON. Tests: fixture classes with setup_*, mock_vertexai_model, mock_mcp_client. Frontend: React components with Framer Motion, TailwindCSS, lucide-react icons, cmdk already installed.
directory_structure: backend/app/agents/ (all agent files), backend/app/utils/ (timectx, user_context), backend/app/db/ (models, repositories, firestore), backend/tests/ (pytest), frontend/app/dashboard/ (main page), frontend/components/ (chat/, drawers/, layout/, ui/, voice/), frontend/hooks/ (useChatSocket), frontend/lib/ (api, ws, voice), mcp-servers/ (google-calendar, google-tasks, google-gmail)
